---
title: "Highlights"
---

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%281%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 1" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%282%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 2" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%283%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 3" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%284%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 4" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%285%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 5" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%286%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 6" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%287%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 7" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%288%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 8" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%289%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 9" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%2810%29.jpg" alt="PharmaRUG 2026 highlight photo 10" width="100%">
